buildCommand: cd dashboard && npm ci && npm run build && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p='.next/server/app/[locale]/(dashboard)/page_client-reference-manifest.js';if(!fs.existsSync(p)){console.log('Creating missing manifest:',p);fs.mkdirSync(require('path').dirname(p),{recursive:true});fs.writeFileSync(p,'module.exports={id:{},name:{},chunks:{}}');}"
